introSection: Children Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Nagashima Spaland in Mie, Japan. The ride was built by Zierer and opened in 1983.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a ladybird.

fullText:
Children Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Nagashima Spaland in Mie, Japan. The ride was built by Zierer and opened in 1983.



Red track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a ladybird.
